message:
feat(palette): query latency instrumentation with micro-bench toggle (1mfw3.1.7)

Add PaletteLatencyStats struct with last/avg/peak latency tracking, budget
health indicator (OK/WARN/SLOW), and opt-in bench mode with queries/sec
throughput. Evidence panel shows latency stats when queries have been recorded.
Alt+B toggles bench mode; bench resets on all palette close paths.

7 tests: record, budget_indicator, reset, bench_toggle, bench_resets_on_close,
bench_resets_on_execute, avg_zero_when_empty.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
